name: Dry_cleaning_landing_page
readme: # CleanPro - Laundry & Wardrobe Care Landing Page A modern and engaging landing page for "CleanPro," a service dedicated to advanced wardrobe care. This project features a striking hero section with a large background image, compelling headlines, a visually integrated product showcase, and clear calls to action, all built with pure HTML and CSS. ## ✨ Features * **Sleek Navigation:** A clean header with service links, pricing, recyclers, and a prominent "Get the App" button. * **Hero Section with Impact:** * Dynamic background image providing a fresh, clean aesthetic. * Large, bold headline: "The New Level of Care for your Wardrobe." * Customer rating integration (5 yellow stars). * Interactive-looking annotations around the central garment image, highlighting key benefits ("Tough stains?", "We'll Handle Any Stain"). * **Product/Service Showcase:** A small, elegant card displaying a stack of towels/clothes with a "2.7k+" statistic and a trust-building tagline. * **Social Proof/Customer Trust:** A bottom section featuring a row of user avatars and a "5k+" count, reinforcing community and trust. * **Primary Call to Action:** A "Reserve Service" button at the bottom right. * **Pure HTML & CSS:** Developed entirely with HTML and CSS, ensuring a lightweight and performant design without reliance on JavaScript. ## 🚀 Live Demo [Optional: Link to your live demo, e.g., GitHub Pages] e.g., `https://yourusername.github.io/cleanpro-lp` ## 💻 Technologies Used * **HTML5:** For structuring the page content and semantic markup. * **CSS3:** For all styling, layout (including advanced positioning), typography, and visual effects. ## 🛠️ Setup and Installation This project is a static website, requiring no special build processes or server setup. 1. **Clone the repository:** ```bash git clone [https://github.com/yourusername/your-repo-name.git](https://github.com/yourusername/your-repo-name.git) ``` 2. **Navigate to the project directory:** ```bash cd your-repo-name ``` 3. **Open `index.html`:** Simply open the `index.html` file in your preferred web browser. ## 📁 Project Structure ``` . ├── index.html # Main HTML file for the landing page ├── style.css # All custom CSS styles | │── background.jpg # Main background image |── shirt.png # Central garment image │── shits.png # Stack of towels image │── img.jpg # User avatars for social proof │── img1.jpg │── ... └── README.md # This README file ``` ## 🎨 Design & Styling Notes * **Modern Aesthetic:** Utilizes clean lines, subtle gradients in the background, and impactful typography for a contemporary feel. * **Layered Visuals:** The central shirt image appears to be layered over the background with descriptive text annotations, creating depth. * **Background Integration:** The overall muted gradient background effectively highlights the white text and product imagery. * **Iconography:** Uses a clean set of icons for stars, service annotations, and the app button. * **Absolute Positioning:** Elements like the main headline, product showcase card, and annotations likely leverage `position: absolute` for precise placement within the hero section. ## 💡 Customization * **Content:** All text can be easily updated directly within the `index.html` file. * **Imagery:** Replace `background.jpg`, `shirt.png`, `towels.png`, and the avatar images in the `assets/` directory with your own visuals. Remember to update the `src` paths in the HTML. * **Styling:** Adjust the `style.css` file to modify colors, fonts, spacing, and the positioning of elements to match your brand's aesthetic. ## 🤝 Contributing Contributions are welcome! If you have suggestions or improvements, please fork the repository and submit a pull request. ## 📄 License This project is open source and available under the [MIT License](LICENSE.md). --- Made with ❤️ by [Your Name/GitHub Username]

name: Inventory-Management-System
readme:
# Inventory-Management-System ## Table of Contents - [Inventory-Management-System](#Inventory-Management-System) - [Table of Contents](#table-of-contents) - [Description](#description) - [Prerequisites](#prerequisites) - [Installation](#installation) - [Clone the Repository](#clone-the-repository) - [Without Docker](#without-docker) - [On Linux](#on-linux) - [On Windows](#on-windows) - [Screenshots](#screenshots) - [Authors](#authors) ## Description This Django application offers a solution for managing business operations with an emphasis on user experience and modern web technologies. It integrates Html, Css, Bootstrap, JavaScript for front-end design. The application features models for Buyers, Supplier, Seasons, Categories, Products, Orders, Deliveries, Reports, Stock Management and inventory management. ## Prerequisites - *Python installed*: Ensure Python is installed on your system. You can download it from the official [Python website](https://www.python.org/). - *Understand Python and Django*: Basic understanding of Python programming and familiarity with Django web framework. ## Installation Follow these steps to install the necessary dependencies and set up the application: ### Clone the Repository bash git clone https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Inventory-Management-System.git
cd Inventory-Management-System ### Without Docker #### On Linux 1. *Set Up the Virtual Environment* bash python3 -m venv venv source venv/bin/activate 2. *Install Dependencies* bash pip install -r requirements.txt 3. *Apply Migrations and Run the Server* bash python manage.py migrate python manage.py runserver #### On Windows 1. *Set Up the Virtual Environment* bash python -m venv venv venv\Scripts\activate 2. *Install Dependencies* bash pip install -r requirements.txt 3. *Apply Migrations and Run the Server* bash python manage.py migrate python manage.py runserver ## Screenshots
Click to view screenshots ![screenshot_1](https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Inventory-Management-System/blob/e3cd0ca9509c833bbd8a294fb3821113125729bd/Screenshot%202025-05-13%20223230.png) ![screenshot_2](https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Inventory-Management-System/blob/db9528a1dd8820613eb801e64bdf96d65820f8db/Screenshot%202025-05-13%20222316.png) ![screenshot_3](https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Inventory-Management-System/blob/db9528a1dd8820613eb801e64bdf96d65820f8db/Screenshot%202025-05-13%20222302.png) ![screenshot_4](https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Inventory-Management-System/blob/db9528a1dd8820613eb801e64bdf96d65820f8db/Screenshot%202025-05-13%20222251.png) ![screenshot_5](https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Inventory-Management-System/blob/db9528a1dd8820613eb801e64bdf96d65820f8db/Screenshot%202025-05-13%20222238.png) ![screenshot_6](https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Inventory-Management-System/blob/db9528a1dd8820613eb801e64bdf96d65820f8db/Screenshot%202025-05-13%20222219.png) ![screenshot_7](https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Inventory-Management-System/blob/db9528a1dd8820613eb801e64bdf96d65820f8db/Screenshot%202025-05-13%20222206.png) ![screenshot_8](https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Inventory-Management-System/blob/db9528a1dd8820613eb801e64bdf96d65820f8db/Screenshot%202025-05-13%20222155.png) ![screenshot_9](https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Inventory-Management-System/blob/db9528a1dd8820613eb801e64bdf96d65820f8db/Screenshot%202025-05-13%20222138.png) ![screenshot_10](https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Inventory-Management-System/blob/db9528a1dd8820613eb801e64bdf96d65820f8db/Screenshot%202025-05-13%20222123.png )
## Authors - [Ayaan Ahmad](https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code) Developed by Ayaan Ahmad.

name: landing_page_cloths
readme: # BEIGES - Sweaters Collection Landing Page A minimalist and elegant landing page for a fashion brand's "Sweaters" collection. This project showcases a clean design, product details, and a visually engaging image collage, built entirely with HTML and CSS using `position: absolute` for precise layout control. ## ✨ Features * **Hero Section:** Prominent "Sweaters" text as the main headline. * **Product Overview:** Concise section for "Product details" and "Materials." * **Visual Collage:** An artistic arrangement of product images using `position: absolute` for a dynamic layout. * **Call to Action:** "New Collection" and "Shop Now" sections at the bottom. * **Pure HTML & CSS:** Developed without any JavaScript, focusing on semantic HTML and precise CSS styling. ## 💻 Technologies Used * **HTML5:** For structuring the content. * **CSS3:** For all styling, including layout with `position: absolute`, typography, and adjustments. ## 🛠️ Setup and Installation This project is a static website, so setting it up is very straightforward: 1. **Clone the repository:** ```bash git clone [https://github.com/yourusername/your-repo-name.git](https://github.com/yourusername/your-repo-name.git) ``` 2. **Navigate to the project directory:** ```bash cd your-repo-name ``` 3. **Open `index.html`:** Simply open the `index.html` file in your web browser. No build tools or server setup are required.

name: Moodify
readme:
# 🎵 Moodify - Where AI Meets Emotion through Music **Moodify** is a cutting-edge MERN stack application that transforms your emotional state into a personalized musical journey. By leveraging real-time facial expression analysis, Moodify curates the perfect soundtrack to match your vibe. ![Moodify Hero](https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Moodify/blob/main/frontend/public/hero.png) ## 🚀 Features * **Real-Time Mood Detection:** Uses MediaPipe and computer vision to analyze facial landmarks and detect emotions (Happy, Sad, Surprised, Neutral, etc.). * **Smart Music Matching:** An AI-powered engine that filters and plays songs from a curated library based on your detected energy. * **Personalized Aura:** Visual resonance and intensity bars that sync with your current emotional state. * **Secure Authentication:** Full-featured JWT-based login and registration system with persistent sessions. * **Seamless Player:** A custom-built music player with play/pause, volume control, playback speed, and mood-synced playlists. ## 🛠️ Tech Stack ### Frontend * **React.js** (Functional Components, Hooks) * **Context API** (State Management) * **SASS/SCSS** (Futuristic UI Styling) * **React Router** (Protected Routing) ### Backend * **Node.js & Express.js** * **MongoDB** (Database) * **JWT & HTTP-Only Cookies** (Secure Auth) ### AI & Tools * **MediaPipe/TensorFlow.js** (Facial Analysis) * **Axios** (API Communication) * **Tavily AI** (Real-time data fetching) ## 📸 Screenshots | Login Page | Dashboard | Mood Detection | |---|---|---| | ![Login](https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Moodify/blob/main/frontend/public/login.png) | ![Dashboard](https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Moodify/blob/main/frontend/public/dashboard.png) | ![Detection](https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Moodify/blob/main/frontend/public/song.png) | ## 🚦 Getting Started ### Prerequisites * Node.js (v18+) * MongoDB Atlas Account * Tavily API Key --- ### Installation 1. **Clone the repository** ```bash git clone [https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Moodify.git](https://github.com/AyaanAhmad-code/Moodify.git) cd Moodify ### 2. Install Dependencies
Bash 

# Install backend deps
npm install
# Install frontend deps
cd frontend && npm install
### 3. Environment Setup
Code snippet 

PORT=5000
MONGO_URI=your_mongodb_uri
JWT_SECRET=your_secret_key
TVLY_API_KEY=your_tavily_key
## Run both frontend and backend npm run dev --- 🛡️ Future Roadmap [ ] Integration with Spotify API for unlimited library access. [ ] Social sharing of "Daily Mood Playlists". [ ] Mobile-responsive PWA (Progressive Web App). --- 👨‍💻 Author Ayaan Ahmad MERN Stack Developer | Sheriyans Coding School Student https://www.linkedin.com/in/ayaanah287/ | https://my-portfolio-ayaan.vercel.app/ --- ⭐️ If you like this project, give it a star!

name: ZenTask
readme: # 🧘 ZenTask - Productivity Dashboard **ZenTask** is a comprehensive, all-in-one productivity dashboard built to help users manage tasks, track time, and stay motivated. It combines essential productivity tools into a single, aesthetically pleasing interface with extensive customization options. ## 🚀 Features ### 1. 🎨 Dynamic Theme Engine * **20+ Unique Themes:** Switch instantly between themes like *Dracula, Midnight Blue, Cyber Purple, Forest Night,* and more. * **CSS Variables:** Built on a robust CSS variable architecture for seamless transitions. ### 2. 🍅 Pomodoro Timer * **Customizable Intervals:** Adjust work sessions, short breaks, and long breaks. * **Visual Progress:** Circular SVG progress ring (Progress Ring) that updates in real-time. * **Session Tracking:** Automatically tracks completed sessions. ### 3. 📝 Task Management (To-Do List) * **CRUD Functionality:** Add, delete, and mark tasks as important. * **Detailed View:** Click tasks to view full details in a modal overlay. * **Persistence:** All tasks are saved automatically to `localStorage`. ### 4. 📅 Daily Planner & Goals * **Hourly Schedule:** Plan your day hour-by-hour (06:00 - 23:00). * **Daily Goals:** Set primary goals for the day that reset every 24 hours. * **Input Saving:** Autosaves your schedule as you type. ### 5. ⛅ Live Weather & Motivation * **Real-time Weather:** Fetches data from [WeatherAPI](https://www.weatherapi.com/) based on user location. * **Dynamic Backgrounds:** The dashboard header changes based on current weather conditions (Rain, Clear, Snow, etc.). * **Daily Quotes:** Fetches motivational quotes from `dummyjson.com`. ## 🛠️ Tech Stack * **Frontend:** HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+) * **Icons:** Remix Icon * **APIs:** * [WeatherAPI](https://www.weatherapi.com/) (Weather data) * [DummyJSON](https://dummyjson.com/) (Quotes) * **Storage:** Browser LocalStorage (No backend required) ## 📂 Project Structure ```bash ZenTask/ ├── index.html # Main HTML structure ├── style.css # Styling, Animations, and Theme Variables ├── script.js # Logic for Weather, Timer, Tasks, and State Management └── RelyneRegular.ttf # Custom Font ``` --- ## ⚙️ How to Run 1. Clone the repository (or download the zip): ```Bash git clone [https://github.com/yourusername/zentask.git](https://github.com/yourusername/zentask.git) ``` 2. Open the project: Navigate to the project folder and open index.html in your browser. 3. API Key Note: The project currently uses a hardcoded demo key for WeatherAPI. For production or long-term use, it is recommended to replace the API_KEY variable in script.js line 443 with your own key from WeatherAPI. --- ## 🕹️ Usage Guide 1. Change Theme: Click the "Change Theme" button in the top right corner to cycle through color palettes. 2. Weather: Type your city name in the input box on the header and hit Enter to update weather data. 3. Pomodoro: Use the + and - buttons to adjust timer settings, then click Start to begin a focus session. 4. Planner: Simply type into the input fields for each hour; your data is saved automatically. --- ## 🤝 Contributing Contributions are welcome! If you have suggestions for new features or themes: 1. Fork the repo. 2. Create a new branch (git checkout -b feature-name). 3. Commit your changes. 4. Push to the branch and submit a PR. --- 📄 License This project is open source and available under the MIT License. --- Built with ❤️ by Ayaan Ahmad ---
